overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a desert mountain overlook at sunset. The character walks along a winding road cut into red rock cliffs, stops at a scenic viewpoint with NPCs overlooking a futuristic city skyline, then continues down the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road along red rock cliff

agents.ego_description: walking along the asphalt road toward a multi-tiered billboard structure built into the cliff face

entered.detail: tall reddish-orange rock face forming the cliff wall alongside the road
multi-tiered advertising structure with digital screens mounted on stone pillars
desert trees with spiky leaves growing along the roadside
wooden power poles with transformers and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding asphalt road cut into a red rock cliff. The stacked billboard structure looms ahead against the cliff face, with Joshua trees and utility poles lining the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook parking area with city view

events.description: turning left off the main road into the open overlook area, revealing the city skyline
sun becomes more prominent and backlit as camera faces the city skyline

agents.ego_description: turning left into the overlook parking area, approaching a group of people at the viewpoint

notable_agents.action: group of people standing at the concrete wall looking out at the city view

entered.detail: distant modern city with tall glass towers and skyscrapers visible across the landscape
low concrete barrier wall with angled supports at the edge of the overlook
large green industrial waste containers near the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a wide-open overlook area, revealing a stunning view of a futuristic city skyline in the distance. The concrete overlook wall and green dumpsters are visible, with a few NPCs gathered at the viewpoint.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded scenic overlook platform with panoramic view

events.description: camera slows and navigates through the group of NPCs gathered at the overlook

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowd of NPCs gathered at the overlook, observing the city view and the people

notable_agents.action: man in tank top gesturing with his hands while talking to another person
woman in red plaid shirt and pink shorts standing with hands on hips

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a moderate crowd of NPCs gathered at the overlook platform. The city skyline shifts to the right as the camera moves, with the concrete wall now on the left. Various NPCs are standing and conversing, including a man gesturing and a woman in red shorts.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic city viewpoint with concrete barriers

events.description: camera pans right to reveal wider view of the city valley and industrial district below
approaching a seated NPC with a 'Talk' prompt appearing, indicating interaction availability

agents.ego_description: panning across the cityscape to take in the panoramic view, then approaching a seated NPC to interact

notable_agents.action: woman sitting on the ground looking up as the camera approaches
man in white pants and jacket standing near the seated woman

entered.detail: large concrete blocks placed along the edge of the overlook platform
dense desert bushes and small trees in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The character pans right to reveal a sweeping view of the city and industrial valley below, with desert scrub in the foreground. The camera then approaches a seated woman NPC with a 'Talk' prompt appearing, while another man stands nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road leaving the overlook

events.description: leaving the overlook area and returning to the winding cliffside road

agents.ego_description: walking away from the overlook down the winding road along the red rock cliff

entered.detail: the multi-tiered billboard structure visible again on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the overlook and returns to the winding mountain road. The red rock cliff dominates the left side again, and the stacked billboard structure reappears as the character walks away from the city view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow mountain pass into a wide scenic overlook before returning to the rugged desert road. It begins with the character walking along a winding asphalt road cut into red rock cliffs, passing Joshua trees and utility poles as a stacked billboard structure looms ahead. As the character turns left, the confined cliffside opens into a concrete overlook platform, revealing a sprawling futuristic city skyline in the distance and a gathering of NPCs. The camera then pans across the industrial valley and desert scrub, moving through the crowd toward a seated woman, before turning away from the vista. Finally, the scene shifts back to the winding road, where the red rock cliffs and billboard structure reappear as the character leaves the city view behind.
